Franchisee Advisory Council exists (contact: Tim Asire)

Confidential Operations Manual is 272 pages covering: Advertising (15), Customer Service (22), Financials/Accounting (45), Food Safety (53), Operations: Store Setup (18), Paperwork (8), Product Storage (17), Systems & Procedures (14), Recipes (80)
State effective dates page shows Maryland registration is pending; other states have effective dates between March 27 and April 14, 2025
